title: Privacy Policy
content: This Privacy Policy has been prepared by the Children's Tribune Social Responsibility Project ("ChildrensTribune", "we", "the project"), operating the website cocuktribunu.org, to clearly state that no personal data is collected, processed or stored.
1. Information Collected

No personal data belonging to visitors is collected through ChildrensTribune.org. Our website does not automatically or manually record names, surnames, email addresses, phone numbers, IP addresses, location data, device information or any similar data.
2. Use of Data
Since no personal data is collected, there is no data usage, analysis, profiling or sharing with third parties.
3. Cookies
ChildrensTribune.org does not use any cookies that track or identify users. The site experience is provided without the need for cookies.
4. Third-Party Services
There are no third-party analytics, advertising or tracking services on our website that collect user data.
5. Data Security
Since no data is collected, there is no personal data that needs to be protected. Nevertheless, our site infrastructure is operated in accordance with current security standards.
6. Children's Privacy
The Children's Tribune project is a social responsibility project centred on children. Even so, no personal data belonging to children or adults is collected, processed or stored through the website.
7. Legal Basis (KVKK)
Since no personal data is processed within the scope of the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 (KVKK), there is no requirement to obtain explicit consent or conduct any data processing activity.
8. Your Rights
Since our website does not process any personal data, there is no data that would require the exercise of rights such as access, rectification, erasure or portability.
9. Policy Changes
This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. The current version is always published at cocuktribunu.org.
10. Contact
If you have any questions about the Privacy Policy, you can contact us via the email address below:
iletisim@cocuktribunu.com
